text.title: cicd-cert-rotation-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cicd-cert-rotation-pipeline as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Issuer (namespace-scoped) instead of ClusterIssuer for certificates that span multiple namespaces.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each namespace requires its own Issuer, multiplying configuration and drift surface. ClusterIssuer is the correct choice for platform-wide issuance; namespace-scoped Issuer is only for tenant isolation requirements.

failure-mode.description: Committing private keys or ACME account keys to Git repositories.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Private keys in Git are permanently compromised even after deletion — the history is cloned by everyone with access. Use SOPS-encrypted secrets, Vault dynamic secrets, or External Secrets Operator to inject private material at runtime.
